User.title: User
User.description: Clinical database record for a registered psychologist

state.description: Entire practice database including patients, sessions, records, financials, and templates

updatedAt.description: Server-side revision timestamp of the clinical state

sessions.description: Weekly or single appointment clinical agendas

statuses.description: Dictionary mapping individual session occurrences to attendance states

templates.description: Clinician's active standard WhatsApp invitation and follow-up templates

customConfirmTemplates.description: Custom communication snippets registered by the practitioner

formsList.description: Defined psycho-evaluative checklists or intake questionnaires

automations.description: State configurations for WhatsApp automatic scheduling follow-ups

occurrenceFinancials.description: Reconciled ledger accounts for individual clinic visits

evolutions.description: Secure evolution logs and subjective clinic annotations

/users/{userId}.description: Highly isolated private silo for psychologist users where document ID corresponds to Auth UID
